title: Appendix 3: The Parish Finance Council – Norms for Parish Finance Councils, Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee
summary: This policy establishes the required norms, membership rules, meeting requirements, functions, and inter-body relationships for Parish Finance Councils within the Diocese of Pensacola-Tallahassee, expanding upon Bishop Ricard's January 2004 foundational letter.
notes: 1) The document is labeled 'Rev 8/14,' which is interpreted as August 2014; no precise day is stated, so the effective date is estimated as 2014-08-01 with medium confidence. 2) The foundational letter is dated January 21, 2004, but the operative policy with enhancements was revised in August 2014; the two layers should not be confused. 3) No explicit next-review date or review cadence is stated; the general clause that 'norms are subject to amendment by the Bishop' does not supply a computable interval. 4) No retention period for Finance Council records is stated in this document; diocesan records-management norms should be consulted separately. 5) Dollar thresholds triggering Bishop's authorization ($10,000) are embedded in the Special Functions section and may need periodic inflation adjustment; a human reviewer should flag whether these figures remain current. 6) The document references Appendix 1 (Canon Law on temporal goods) and Appendix 10.1 (annual financial report format) which are not included here and should be verified as current. 7) The chapter/section/item address is a placeholder; the diocese's actual policy manual numbering system should be applied by a human reviewer. 8) Owner role is identified as CFO based on explicit references in the 'General' section; the Bishop retains ultimate authority for extraordinary acts.
